title: CA Logic
subtitle: In California a 17 year-old can drive a car but can’t ride alone in an Uber or a Waymo. I long for the days when you could put a kid in the post. We have weakened as a civilization.
contentHtml:
In California a 17 year-old can drive a car but can’t ride alone in an Uber or a Waymo.

I long for the days when you could put a kid in the post. We have weakened as a civilization.
